simple_types.name: Argument_Type
simple_types.code: type Argument_Type is (Str, Num, Bool, Hex_Num);

record_types.name: Argument_Def

fields.name: Arg_Name
fields.description: Full name for the argument i.e --output

fields.name: Arg_Description
fields.description: Description for help generation (not implemented yet)

fields.name: Arg_Type
fields.description: Type for the argument, can be Str, Num, Bool, Hex_Num

fields.name: Multi_Flags
fields.description:
Compact form will allow arguments in the form of
-Wall or -ffreestanding, it will save the argument as
ffreestanding and the only supported type for this form
Bool

generic_instantiations.name: Arg_Def_Alias_Map
generic_instantiations.code:
package Arg_Def_Alias_Map is new
  Ada.Containers.Indefinite_Hashed_Maps
    (Key_Type        => String,
     Element_Type    => String,
     Hash            => Ada.Strings.Hash,
     Equivalent_Keys => "=");

generic_instantiations.name: Arg_Def_HM
generic_instantiations.code:
package Arg_Def_HM is new
  Ada.Containers.Indefinite_Hashed_Maps
    (Key_Type        => String,
     Element_Type    => Argument_Def,
     Hash            => Ada.Strings.Hash,
     Equivalent_Keys => "=");

generic_instantiations.name: Arg_Val_HM
generic_instantiations.code:
package Arg_Val_HM is new
  Ada.Containers.Indefinite_Hashed_Maps
    (Key_Type        => String,

     Hash            => Ada.Strings.Hash,
     Equivalent_Keys => "=");

generic_instantiations.name: Str_Vector
generic_instantiations.code:
package Str_Vector is new
  Ada.Containers.Vectors
    (Index_Type   => Natural,
     Element_Type => Unbounded_String);
